head: 5b1cc78
prerequisite_reason: Enterprise-Grade final score 3.8 < 8.5 threshold. Internal engineering is strong (38/38 validate-all gates pass, internalEngineeringReadiness 7.7, enterpriseReadiness 6.9), but formal E-GAP prerequisite is not satisfied due to pending external validations (SOC 2 Type I, pen-test SOW signature).

external_dependencies.blocker: Enterprise-Grade external validations incomplete (SOC 2 Type I, pen-test SOW)
No CPA engaged; no audited financials; no engagement letter
No external code audit report (SAST/CodeQL/TruffleHog only)
Accounting policies documented but no forensic accounting readiness review by CPA

controls.name: Enterprise-Grade prerequisite
controls.evidence: E-GAP evidence file exists with final_score 3.8 (< 8.5). However, in-repo engineering is strong: 38/38 validate-all gates pass, internalEngineeringReadiness 7.7, enterpriseReadiness 6.9 (latest.json). External gaps blocking E-GAP are SOC 2 Type I and pen-test SOW signature.
controls.raw_output: docs/audit/prompts/evidence/enterprise-grade-evidence.json: final_score 3.8; latest.json: internalEngineeringReadiness 7.7, enterpriseReadiness 6.9, validateAll 38/38 pass

controls.name: Financial audit (GAAP/IFRS)
controls.evidence: No audited financial statements found. No CPA engagement letter. Bookkeeping system not identified (no QuickBooks/Xero/Sage/NetSuite references). Accounting policies, expense policy, and trust-account framework are documented but unaudited.
controls.raw_output: find docs/financial/: accounting-policies.md, expense-policy.md, trust-account.md, README.md; no *audited-financial-statements*; no *engagement* or *letter*cpa* files; grep quickbooks/xero/sage/netsuite: no results

controls.name: Cap table security
controls.evidence: No cap table platform documented (no Carta, Pulley, AngelList, or EquityZen references). No shareholder agreement found. No 2FA/MFA enforcement documentation for cap table access.
controls.raw_output: grep -ri carta/pulley/angelist/equityzen docs/financial/ docs/legal/: no results; grep -ri 2fa/mfa/two.factor docs/legal/: no results; docs/legal/shareholder-agreement.md: not found

controls.name: Deep code audit (critical paths)
controls.evidence: SAST in CI: CodeQL (security-evidence.yml), TruffleHog secret scanning (secret-scan.yml), Trivy IaC scanning (ci.yml), OWASP ZAP DAST (dast-zap.yml). No hardcoded secrets found in tools/*/src/ — grep results show only legitimate crypto API usage (crypto.subtle.generateKey, idempotencyKey, canonicalizeValue). Critical paths in this repo center on audit-signing and compliance-gateway crypto operations. No external code audit report (pen-test scope/RFP exists but no completed report).
controls.raw_output: g tcx-platforms/src/ and gtcx-protocols/src/: directories do not exist in this repo; grep -ri password/secret/key.*=.*['"] tools/*/src/: only legitimate API usage; .github/workflows/security-evidence.yml: CodeQL configured; .github/workflows/secret-scan.yml: TruffleHog; .github/workflows/ci.yml: Trivy config scan; .github/workflows/dast-zap.yml: OWASP ZAP; docs/audit/pen-test-scope-2026.md and pen-test-rfp-2026.md exist but no report

controls.name: IP cleanliness review
controls.evidence: LICENSE is MIT (permissive). pnpm licenses list shows all permissive licenses: MIT, Apache-2.0, BSD-3-Clause, 0BSD, AFL-2.1 OR BSD-3-Clause. No GPL/AGPL/copyleft found in package.json or pnpm-lock.yaml. No third-party proprietary code contamination in tools/*/src/.
controls.raw_output: LICENSE: MIT License (Copyright 2024-present GTCX Protocol); pnpm licenses list: MIT, Apache-2.0, BSD-3-Clause, 0BSD, (AFL-2.1 OR BSD-3-Clause); grep -ri gpl/copyleft/agpl package.json pnpm-lock.yaml: no results; grep -ri copyright/proprietary/confidential tools/*/src/ | grep -v gtcx: no results

controls.name: Forensic accounting readiness
controls.evidence: Accounting policies documented (IFRS primary, SA GAAP supplementary, revenue recognition, related-party transactions, fixed assets, foreign currency, taxation). Expense policy exists with approval hierarchy. Trust-account framework exists. No independent CPA forensic accounting review.
controls.raw_output: docs/financial/accounting-policies.md: exists (IFRS/SA GAAP, related-party section present); docs/financial/expense-policy.md: exists; docs/financial/trust-account.md: exists; find docs/: no independent CPA review or forensic accounting report

controls.name: Key-person risk mitigation
controls.evidence: Bus factor > 2 documented in risk register (R-001) and business continuity policy (A17). 21 READMEs in tools/, 101 READMEs total. 39+ operational runbooks in docs/operations/runbooks/ covering DR, incident response, deployment, key rotation, rollback, and tenant onboarding.
controls.raw_output: docs/compliance/risk-register.md: R-001 bus-factor > 2 for all critical systems; docs/compliance/policies/a17-business-continuity.md: key-person dependencies documented; find tools/ -name README*: 21; find . -name README*: 101; ls docs/operations/runbooks/ | grep -v README | grep -v template: 39 runbooks

controls.name: Regulatory relationship map
controls.evidence: Regulatory contacts documented for SARB, FSCA, FIC. No enforcement actions, fines, penalties, or cease-and-desist orders found. Licenses are NOT current: SARB (no engagement filed), FSCA (no license applied), FIC (not registered as Accountable Institution).
controls.raw_output: docs/compliance/regulatory-contacts.md: exists with SARB/FSCA/FIC contacts and status; grep -ri enforcement/fine/penalty/cease docs/compliance/ docs/legal/: only policy references, no actual actions; docs/compliance/regulatory-contacts.md: SARB=no engagement filed, FSCA=no license applied, FIC=not registered

controls.name: Customer concentration risk
controls.evidence: No revenue analytics document. No customer concentration or diversification policy. Pre-revenue / S2 pilot stage.
controls.raw_output: docs/financial/revenue-analytics.md: not found; grep -ri concentration/diversification/single.customer docs/financial/: no results

controls.name: ESG baseline
controls.evidence: ESG policy exists (GTCX-ESG-001) with carbon baseline (~17 tCO₂e), 2026/2030 carbon targets, diversity & inclusion metrics and programs, and King IV/GRI/UN SDG alignment. Board charter exists (GTCX-BOARD-001). No standalone carbon-footprint.md — carbon data is embedded in ESG policy.
controls.raw_output: docs/esg/esg-policy.md: exists with carbon baseline, diversity metrics, inclusion programs; docs/governance/board-charter.md: exists; docs/esg/carbon-footprint.md: not found (data in esg-policy.md); grep -ri diversity/inclusion/gender/demographics docs/hr/ docs/esg/: found in esg-policy.md

recommendations: Complete Enterprise-Grade external validations (SOC 2 Type I, pen-test SOW signature) to satisfy I.1 prerequisite.
Engage CPA for audited financials and sign engagement letter before Series B term sheet (I.2).
Implement cap table platform (Carta/Pulley) with 2FA enforcement and draft shareholder agreement (I.3).
Commission external code audit on critical paths (audit-signing, compliance-gateway crypto) (I.4).
File SARB payment system notification, apply FSCA Category I/II license, and register with FIC (I.8).
Create revenue analytics document and customer concentration policy once commercial traction begins (I.9).
Extract carbon footprint into standalone doc or measurement artifact (I.10).
